name: DoorDash Drive API
what_it_does: White-label on-demand delivery API that lets businesses dispatch drivers from DoorDash's network without exposing the DoorDash brand.
use_cases: Dispatching same-day deliveries for e-commerce or grocery businesses
Building a branded delivery experience using DoorDash's driver network
Getting real-time delivery quotes before committing to a delivery
Tracking delivery status programmatically via webhooks
not_for: Consumer-facing food ordering (use DoorDash Marketplace for that)
High-volume bulk delivery scheduling (no batch dispatch API)
best_when: You need a turnkey last-mile delivery network without operating your own fleet, and your customers are in US/Canada DoorDash coverage zones.
avoid_when: You need international coverage beyond DoorDash's footprint, sub-15-minute delivery SLAs, or want to avoid per-delivery commission pricing.

auth.notes: JWT-based auth using a developer_id + key_id + signing_secret. Tokens are self-generated and short-lived (10 min TTL). Requires careful key management — no OAuth flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-delivery fee negotiated via partnership; sandbox is free
pricing.notes: Pricing is commission/per-delivery and requires a business partnership agreement. Sandbox environment available for development without charges.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; enforced per account

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns structured JSON errors with codes, but error catalog is incomplete in docs
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: external_delivery_id can be used for idempotency on delivery creation, but not all endpoints support it
known_agent_gotchas: Partnership/approval required before production access — sandbox only during development
JWT tokens expire in 10 minutes; agents must implement token refresh logic
Real-money deliveries are triggered immediately on creation — agents need confirmation gates
Webhook signature verification is required and not optional
Coverage area must be validated before creating a delivery or the call fails

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; JWT signing requires secure storage of signing secret; no granular API scopes
